metadata.description: EstreGenesis self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace. Currently ships Constellation (live multi-agent orchestration with MCP integration) and Superscalar (execution-scheduling discipline) as Phase 1 prototype plugins. Plugins are Apache-2.0 licensed; the marketplace mirrors the EG repo's main branch.

plugins.name: constellation
plugins.description: Live multi-agent orchestration: WebSocket server + A2A messaging + dashboard + Stop hook helper + MCP server (Phase 2 full impl: WS proxy + 5 tools incl. a2a_wait_ack 3-tier + §13.13.2 dedup + chunked transfer). Bundles the v2.5.x reference runtime, the v2.5.3 SSoT-compliant gateway-client, the v0.4 MCP integration (§8), the v2.5.10 attachment transport-mode (§13.11 rule 5), and the v2.5.11 at-least-once relay reliability (§13.13.2). npm dep: ws ^8.18.0.

plugins.name: superscalar
plugins.description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch: issue_width formula (effort_band + pace_mode + Little's Law + Kanban WIP + autonomy_available_workers) + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds. Plugin v0.1.0 wraps Superscalar.md v0.4 as a model-invoked skill the agent consults before fan-out decisions.
